notableEvents.label: Cal Raleigh GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cal Raleigh grounds into a double play, first baseman Alec Burleson to shortstop Masyn Winn to pitcher Gordon Graceffo. Rob Refsnyder out at 2nd. Cal Raleigh out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Canzone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone singles on a ground ball to center fielder Victor Scott II. Cole Young scores.

notableEvents.label: Connor Joe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Mitch Garver scores. Cole Young scores.

notableEvents.label: Cole Young plunked
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young hit by pitch. J.P. Crawford to 3rd. Mitch Garver to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Connor Joe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe lines out to center fielder Victor Scott II. Cole Young to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera plunked
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera hit by pitch. JJ Wetherholt to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Jordan Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Church GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Church grounds into a double play, first baseman Josh Naylor to shortstop J.P. Crawford. Nolan Gorman out at 2nd. Nathan Church out at 1st.
